redaction_note: Synthetic compact fixture for route-sensitive tournament calibration.
summary: Third compact fixture keeps route diversity without historical file names.
setpoint: preserve route-specific winners without importing historical run inventory

turns.speaker: fixture-policy
turns.text: Do not let public Farcaster reply behavior bypass approval.

turns.speaker: fixture-damping
turns.text: One single transient failure should not trigger overreaction.

turns.speaker: fixture-skill
turns.text: Reusable workflow steps should run validate, preflight, and simulate before reuse.

turns.speaker: fixture-case
turns.text: Repeated timeout failure error retry evidence should be recorded as a case.

turns.speaker: fixture-memory
turns.text: Stable project facts include local repo, VPS, GitHub, window, and distill context.
